description: HIGH/CRITICAL blast or unknown approach. Adds explorer + researcher + overthinker as parallel advisors BEFORE executor. Use for scrutiny>=high, cross-cutting refactors, or when external library/API knowledge is needed. Includes full Iron pipeline gates after executor.

steps.title: {{root_title}}
steps.description:
PROBLEM: (fill in: what needs implementing and why)
SCOPE: {{scope}}
NON_GOALS: (fill in)
VALIDATION: (fill in)
ACCEPTANCE: (fill in: externally observable outcome)

HIGH/CRITICAL blast. Three parallel advisors (explorer + researcher + overthinker) prep before executor implements. Full Iron pipeline gates apply.

steps.title: explorer:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: READ_ONLY codebase mapper — produce evidence for executor.
INPUTS: root contract.
OUTPUTS: structured findings — call flows, dependencies, implementation options, files-to-touch list with file:line. No code edits.
SCOPE: {{scope}} and adjacent symbols/processes.
NON_GOALS: no edits; no symptoms-debugging (use debugger for that).

steps.title: researcher:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: external-source researcher (READ_ONLY). Dispatch when root mentions external libraries / APIs / frameworks where current knowledge matters more than internal code.
INPUTS: root contract (especially any library/API references).
OUTPUTS: structured ecosystem evidence — current API syntax, recent migrations, repo internals, recommended patterns. Cite sources.
SCOPE: external research only; no local code reading.
NON_GOALS: no edits; no local code mapping (use explorer for that).

steps.title: overthinker:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: devil's-advocate review (READ_ONLY). 4-phase chain-of-thought: initial analysis → critique → synthesis → distilled recommendation.
INPUTS: root contract; explorer findings (if available); researcher evidence (if available).
OUTPUTS: structured 4-phase analysis. Phase 4 = clear, actionable conclusion with concrete recommendations. Surface uncertainty explicitly.
SCOPE: design + tradeoff space implied by root.
NON_GOALS: no edits; no symptom-debugging.

steps.title: executor:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: implement root's deliverable per its contract, informed by advisor evidence.
INPUTS: root contract + explorer findings + researcher evidence (if dispatched) + overthinker recommendations.
OUTPUTS: diff on chain branch satisfying ACCEPTANCE; tests per VALIDATION; obligations discipline.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no `--no-verify`; no scope creep; no merge.

steps.title: code-sanity:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: Iron-style mandatory seconder gate (READ_ONLY) on executor's diff.
INPUTS: executor's diff; root contract.
OUTPUTS: verdict OK or FINDINGS (with file:line + severity).
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits; skip allowed only for test-only / new-file-only diffs.

steps.title: obligations-scanner:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: scan executor's diff for unstructured markers in production code.
INPUTS: executor's diff.
OUTPUTS: CLEAN | OBLIGATIONS_FOUND | BLOCKED. Distinguish production vs test; tracked vs untracked markers.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits.

steps.title: reviewer:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: compliance reviewer + adversarial code-quality auditor at SCRUTINY={{scrutiny}}.
INPUTS: executor diff + code-sanity verdict + obligations-scanner output + advisor findings + root contract.
OUTPUTS: verdict PASS|PARTIAL|FAIL + Release Checklist. PARTIAL triggers ddiff re-review.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits; do not waive mandatory gates.
